hub.fcttemplate_desc.tr: Functional Communication Training planning सँग modality selection

hub.intervention_desc.tr: AI-generated भयो multi-week हस्तक्षेप योजना सँग measurable लक्ष्य र milestones

hub.maintenance_desc.tr: Track सीप retention post-mastery र generalization पारि सेटिङहरू, people, र सामग्रीहरू

hub.pdpath_desc.tr: Guided onboarding modules का लागि building ABA सीप step-by-step

hub.quick_launch_hint.tr: Core clinical उपकरणहरू — one tap पहुँच

hub.replacebehavior_desc.tr: Map व्यवहार को concern मा functionally समतुल्य replacements सँग teaching रणनीतिहरू

hub.restorative_desc.tr: step-by-step scripts का लागि harm repair, community वृत्त, र reintegration conferences

hub.scdmanager_desc.tr: AB, ABAB, धेरै Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion

hub.sessionnotes_desc.tr: Timestamped अवलोकन टिप्पणीहरू सँग आवाज dictation — capture सन्दर्भ as it happens

hub.sessiontracker_desc.tr: systematic सत्र-आधारित behavioral measurement सँग rate calculation

hub.socialvalidity_desc.tr: TARF र IRP-15 scales का लागि measuring treatment acceptability — आवश्यक का लागि publication

hub.taskanalysis_desc.tr: Break सीप भित्र teachable चरण सँग forward, backward, वा total-task chaining र prompt ट्र्याकिङ

hub.teamnotes_desc.tr: Multi-role timestamped collaboration thread का लागि शिक्षक, paras, counselors, र अभिभावक

hub.treatintegrity_desc.tr: कागजात whether हस्तक्षेप छन् implemented as designed — घटक-स्तर fidelity ट्र्याकिङ

hub.cantdowontdo_desc.tr: क्रमबद्ध गर्नुहोस् सीप vs. performance deficits मा pick सही सहयोग.

hub.competingpathways_desc.tr: Map desired र replacement व्यवहार against problem path.

hub.functionquiz_desc.en: Practice identifying behavior function from short scenarios.
hub.functionquiz_desc.tr: अभ्यास गर्नुहोस् identifying व्यवहार function बाट छोटो scenarios.

hub.mipractice_desc.tr: Rehearse MI conversations सँग simulated विद्यार्थी responses.

hub.practicum_desc.tr: चलाउनुहोस् एक guided अभ्यास गर्नुहोस् case बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस् मा finish.

overview.empty_desc.en: Start collecting ABC data or run live observations to see trends here.
overview.empty_desc.tr: सुरु गर्नुहोस् collecting ABC डेटा वा चलाउनुहोस् प्रत्यक्ष अवलोकन मा हेर्नुहोस् trends here.

hotspot.tap_hint.en: Tap a cell to increment. Click routine name to edit.
hotspot.tap_hint.tr: Tap एक सेल मा increment. क्लिक गर्नुहोस् routine name मा सम्पादन गर्नुहोस्.

quick_fill_hint.en: AI will parse your description into the fields below. You can then edit manually.
quick_fill_hint.tr: AI गर्नेछ parse तपाईंको description भित्र fields below. तपाईं सक्छ त्यसपछि सम्पादन गर्नुहोस् म्यानुअल रूपमा.

quiz_fba_purpose.en: What is the primary purpose of an FBA?
quiz_fba_purpose.tr: के हो primary purpose को एक FBA?

quick_fill_placeholder.en: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
quick_fill_placeholder.tr: e.g. "विद्यार्थी threw paper दौडान गणित जब asked मा देखाउनुहोस् काम, शिक्षक redirected calmly"

reinforce_step_1.en: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
reinforce_step_1.tr: सुरु गर्नुहोस् सँग dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 वा FR-2)

reinforce_step_2.en: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
reinforce_step_2.tr: Once व्यवहार हो consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2

reinforce_step_3.en: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
reinforce_step_3.tr: सार्नुहोस् मा चर schedule (VR) का लागि थप natural maintenance

reinforce_step_4.en: Gradually increase VR value (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
reinforce_step_4.tr: Gradually increase VR मान (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)

quiz_opt_any_stops.en: Any behavior that stops the problem
quiz_opt_any_stops.tr: कुनै पनि व्यवहार त्यो stops problem

ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.en: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.tr: एक break? मद्दत? Someone मा सुन्नुहोस्? Space?

ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.en: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.tr: थप्नुहोस् सन्दर्भ, constraints, वा विशिष्ट चुनौती... e.g., " विद्यार्थी also has एक speech delay" वा "यो हो एक middle school विद्यार्थी"

ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.en: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.tr: कुनै पनि अन्य विवरण (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...

ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.en: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.tr: Describe scenario तपाईं चाहन्छन् मा अभ्यास गर्नुहोस् सँग...

ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.en: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.tr: Describe विद्यार्थी persona... e.g., "तपाईं छन् एक 3rd grader who becomes anxious दौडान गणित र tends मा cry र shut down..."

ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.en: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.tr: e.g. "Does एक token economy reduce off-task व्यवहार दौडान गणित निर्देशन?"

ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.en: e.g., "Student is defiant and refuses to follow directions."
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.tr: e.g., "विद्यार्थी हो defiant र refuses मा follow directions."

ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.en: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.tr: e.g. "विद्यार्थी सँग autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "नयाँ मा school"

ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.en: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.tr: प्रविष्ट गर्नुहोस् behavioral लक्ष्य मा scale (e.g., "विद्यार्थी गर्नेछ remain मा seat दौडान independent काम का लागि 15 minutes")

ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.en:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.tr:
Reflect मा तपाईंको approach...
• के worked well?
• के would तपाईं do differently?
• के रणनीतिहरू do तपाईं चाहन्छन् मा अभ्यास गर्नुहोस् अर्को?

ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.en: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.tr: साझा गर्नुहोस् के तपाईं notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural सन्दर्भ, वा suggestions का लागि school टोली...

ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.en: Type your response here. Be thorough and use professional language...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.tr: प्रकार तपाईंको प्रतिक्रिया here. Be thorough र प्रयोग गर्नुहोस् professional भाषा...

ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.en: What could you or a grown-up do differently?
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.tr: के could तपाईं वा एक grown-up do differently?

ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.en: What made you feel this way? (optional)
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.tr: के made तपाईं feel यो way? (वैकल्पिक)

ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.en: What was going on before you felt this way?
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.tr: के was going मा पहिले तपाईं felt यो way?

toast.added_n_entries_to_abc_data.tr: Added N entries मा ABC डेटा!

toast.all_entries_already_synced_to_abc_.tr: सबै entries already synced मा ABC डेटा

toast.dro_interval_complete_reinforce_no.tr: 🎉 DRO interval पूरा गर्नुहोस् — REINFORCE! No लक्ष्य व्यवहार occurred!

toast.each_phase_needs_at_least_2_data_p.tr: प्रत्येक phase needs at least 2 डेटा बिन्दु

toast.effect_sizes_attached_to_iep_prep.en: Effect sizes attached to IEP Prep!
toast.effect_sizes_attached_to_iep_prep.tr: Effect sizes attached मा IEP Prep!

toast.failed_to_generate_case_study_try_.tr: Failed मा उत्पन्न गर्नुहोस् case study. प्रयास गर्नुहोस् again.

toast.graph_data_attached_to_iep_prep.tr: ग्राफ डेटा attached मा IEP Prep!

toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl.tr: ग्राफ डेटा ready — auto-fill उपलब्ध मा Effect Size!

toast.mastered_n_n_consecutive_sessions_.tr: 🎉 MASTERED! N — N consecutive सत्र at criterion!

toast.merged_n_abc_entries_and_n_observa.en: Merged N ABC entries and N observations
toast.merged_n_abc_entries_and_n_observa.tr: Merged N ABC entries र N अवलोकन

toast.n_home_entries_pushed_to_abc_data.tr: N home entries pushed मा ABC डेटा ✅

toast.name_at_least_one_target_behavior.en: Name at least one target behavior
